economic_notes: Band operates numerous commercial enterprises including fisheries, gaming, trade and convention centre, insurance brokers, data centre, geomatics, sport and wellness centre, bowling lanes, market, and entertainment centre. Band holds 35.71% of First Nations Fisheries Interest Group. Purchased fishing licenses valued at $118,114,205. FNFIG commitment of $2,590,432 annually for subordinated debt purchase over 30 years.
notes: Fiscal year 2022 (ended March 31, 2022). Large long-term debt of $205M primarily from First Nation Finance Authority ($154M) related to fishing license purchases. Prior year included $114.7M in fishing license acquisitions recorded as intangible assets at $118.1M on balance sheet. GBE is Membertou Properties Limited Partnership accounted for on modified equity basis. Net financial liabilities position of -$180M. Segment disclosure schedule (Schedule A) referenced but numerical detail not included in extracted text. No schedule of remuneration included in extracted text. Annual debt service reflects repayment of long-term debt only; capital lease repayments of $265,706 additional. Deferred trust contributions of $6.6M for children's trust fund. Interest rate swap hedge in place for prime+1.5% mortgage at 3.495% fixed.
